item.title: 5.0.0-beta.1
item.description:
ExtraDock 5.0.0-beta.1 – The First V5 Beta! 🚀✨

🧪 Welcome to the ExtraDock 5 Beta

  • Ground-Up Rewrite: ExtraDock 5 is a brand-new app built for macOS 26 (Tahoe), rebuilt from the ground up for speed and reliability!
  • Import From V4: Bring your existing docks and settings over from ExtraDock 4 in a couple of clicks!
  • Beta Channel Built In: Stay on the beta channel in Settings to keep receiving pre-release builds automatically!

🚀 What's Next?

This is the first beta — your feedback shapes the road to 5.0! Please report anything that feels off.

Thank you for helping test ExtraDock 5! Your feedback drives every improvement we make. 💙
